data.title: ICRA Reaffirms KPI Green Energy’s Credit Ratings on Expanded Facilities
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from KPI Green Energy Limited ( (IN:KPIGREEN) ).

KPI Green Energy Limited announced that ICRA Limited has reaffirmed its credit ratings for various bank facilities, including term loans, cash credit, working capital demand loans, vendor bill discounting, bank guarantees and other limits, largely at [ICRA]A (Stable) for long-term facilities and [ICRA]A2+ for short-term facilities. The reaffirmation, alongside an enhanced rated amount of Rs. 5,775 crore for bank facilities and Rs. 643.20 crore for non-convertible debentures at [ICRA]AA+ (CE) (Stable), underscores the company’s maintained credit strength and financial flexibility as it continues to expand its renewable energy operations, which may support confidence among lenders and investors in its growth trajectory.

More about KPI Green Energy Limited

KPI Green Energy Limited operates in the renewable energy sector, focusing on the development and operation of solar power projects. The company’s activities include setting up utility-scale solar plants and related infrastructure, targeting India’s growing clean energy market and supporting the shift toward sustainable power generation.

Average Trading Volume: 262,662

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 70.71B INR

data.title: Puma VCT 13 Boosts Fund-Raising Target to £70 Million After Strong Demand
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Puma VCT 13 PLC ( (GB:PU13) ).

Puma VCT 13 plc has increased the size of its current fund-raising offer after strong investor demand for its new ordinary shares. The company originally sought to raise up to £50 million with an additional £20 million over-allotment facility and has now exercised that facility in full.

As a result, the maximum amount the trust can raise under the ongoing offer has risen to £70 million, expanding its capacity to deploy capital into qualifying venture investments. This enlarged raise underscores robust investor appetite for venture capital trust products and may enhance Puma VCT 13’s ability to scale its investment activities and broaden its portfolio of growth companies.

More about Puma VCT 13 PLC

Puma VCT 13 plc is a UK-listed venture capital trust that raises funds from investors to back a diversified portfolio of smaller, high-growth companies. It offers ordinary shares to investors seeking exposure to venture capital opportunities alongside associated tax-efficient investment structures in the UK market.

Average Trading Volume: 703,306

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Nevada Organic Phosphate Touts Murdock Mountain as Fertilizer Supply Crunch Deepens
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Silver Eagle Mines Inc. ( (TSE:NOP) ) is now available.

Nevada Organic Phosphate is highlighting the strategic value of its Murdock Mountain direct-application rock phosphate project as geopolitical turmoil in the Middle East disrupts global fertilizer supply chains. With much of the world’s nitrogen fertilizer, sulfur, and urea flows impeded by attacks on energy infrastructure and a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, conventional sulfur- and ammonia-intensive phosphate producers are facing higher costs and constrained output.

By contrast, NOP’s U.S.-based project does not rely on sulfur, ammonia, or high-energy chemical processing and is insulated from maritime chokepoints, giving it potential appeal as a stable, low-energy nutrient source for organic and regenerative farming systems. The company’s positioning underscores how domestic, policy-independent phosphate resources could gain prominence as fertilizer markets undergo one of their most severe supply shocks in decades, with implications for farmers, input costs, and food security.

More about Silver Eagle Mines Inc.

Nevada Organic Phosphate Inc. is a junior exploration company focused on organic sedimentary raw rock phosphate in northeast Nevada, where it controls a 6.6-kilometre phosphate bed with applications that could extend the strike length to more than 30 kilometres. The project, believed to be the only large-scale organic sedimentary phosphate deposit in North America, is located near major highway and rail links serving Nevada and California, positioning it to supply fertilizer markets in the western United States.

Average Trading Volume: 713,196

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$17.06M

Learn more about NOP stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: INWIT Calls Remote Shareholders’ Meeting to Approve 2025 Results and Share Cancellation
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Inwit ( (IT:INW) ) has shared an announcement.

INWIT’s Board of Directors has convened a shareholders’ meeting for 30 April 2026, to be held exclusively via remote communication with participation through a designated representative. On the agenda in ordinary session are approval of the 2025 financial statements and profit allocation, a vote on the 2026 remuneration policy and 2025 compensation report, adoption of a long-term share-based incentive plan for 2026–2030, and the appointment of one director.

In extraordinary session, shareholders will be asked to approve the cancellation of 27,895,167 treasury shares previously repurchased, without reducing share capital, which may improve capital efficiency and share metrics. The Board will separately approve 2025 results on 2 April 2026 and has confirmed that all directors meet integrity requirements, with most meeting independence standards, reinforcing the company’s governance framework ahead of the meeting.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:INW) stock is a Hold with a EUR10.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Inwit stock, see the IT:INW Stock Forecast page.

More about Inwit

Infrastrutture Wireless Italiane S.p.A. (INWIT) is an Italian operator in the wireless infrastructure sector, managing telecommunications towers and related assets. The company provides passive infrastructure services to mobile network operators and other connectivity providers, supporting mobile coverage and network deployment across Italy.

Average Trading Volume: 4,823,632

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: €5.67B

data.title: Dinero Ventures Launches Private Placement to Fund Critical Mineral Exploration in B.C.
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Dinero Ventures Ltd ( (TSE:DNO) ) just unveiled an update.

Dinero Ventures Ltd., a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on high-quality projects in British Columbia, continues to pursue value creation through disciplined exploration and responsible development. Its activities are centered on generating and advancing mineral assets in key mining regions of the province.

The company announced a non-brokered private placement financing of 2,850,000 flow-through units and 500,000 non-flow-through units at $0.10 per unit, raising gross proceeds of $335,000 to fund work at its Mount Bisson project. Proceeds from the flow-through units will be directed toward Canadian Exploration Expenses qualifying as Critical Mineral Mining Expenditures, offering investors access to federal and British Columbia mineral exploration tax credits while the financing remains subject to TSX Venture Exchange approval and standard hold periods on the issued securities.

More about Dinero Ventures Ltd

Dinero Ventures Ltd. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on acquiring and advancing high-quality mineral properties in British Columbia. The company aims to build shareholder value through disciplined exploration, responsible project development and strategic generation of new mineral opportunities in the province.

data.title: Majority Owner Heimstø AS Launches Strategic Review of Måsøval Stake
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Masoval AS ( (DE:9QP) ) has provided an announcement.

Heimstø AS, which owns around 70% of Måsøval AS, has launched a strategic review of its stake in the Norwegian salmon producer as part of a broader portfolio assessment. The process, advised by DNB Carnegie, will examine various ownership options but does not yet commit to any specific transaction.

If the review ultimately results in a deal, Heimstø intends to give remaining shareholders the opportunity to sell their shares on equal terms, signaling a potential change in control structure. The outcome could reshape Måsøval’s ownership base and influence its strategic direction in the global salmon market, with further information to be provided as the review progresses.

More about Masoval AS

Måsøval AS is a fully integrated producer of Atlantic salmon based on the island of Frøya in Central Norway, with more than 50 years of operational experience. The company controls the entire value chain from smolt production to sea-based farming, harvesting, processing, and global sales, focusing on sustainable growth, fish welfare, and consistent delivery of premium salmon to the global market.

Average Trading Volume: 12,611

Current Market Cap: NOK2.77B

For an in-depth examination of 9QP stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Reckitt executives retain shares after LTIP vesting and tax-related sales
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Reckitt ( (GB:RKT) ) just unveiled an update.

Reckitt Benckiser has reported changes in shareholdings of senior executives following the vesting of awards under its 2015 Long Term Incentive Plan. Chief executive Kris Licht, chief financial officer Shannon Eisenhardt and Nutrition president Susan Sholtis each saw performance share awards vest at 63%, with additional shares accrued as dividend equivalents.

A portion of the vested shares for all three executives was sold on 23 March to cover tax and social security liabilities, with the balance retained, in some cases subject to a two-year holding period. The transactions, disclosed under market abuse regulations, underline the company’s continued use of equity-based remuneration to align leadership incentives with shareholder interests while maintaining transparency around insider dealings.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:RKT) stock is a Hold with a £5460.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Reckitt stock, see the GB:RKT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RKT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RKT is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial performance (notably profitability and lower leverage) and supportive valuation (moderate P/E and solid yield). These are tempered by weak technicals (below key moving averages with negative momentum) and earnings-call-flagged near-term pressures on cash flow, leverage, and 2026 margin/EPS visibility.

To see Spark’s full report on RKT stock, click here.

More about Reckitt

Reckitt Benckiser Group plc is a global consumer goods company focused on health, hygiene and nutrition brands. The group markets a portfolio of household and personal care products across multiple regions, targeting both everyday consumer needs and specialist categories with a strong presence in developed and emerging markets.

Energean ( (GB:ENOG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Energean has granted a series of conditional share awards to senior executives under its 2026 Long-Term Incentive Plan, including CEO Mathios Rigas, CFO Panos Benos and regional and functional heads. The awards, over ordinary shares with no upfront cost, are subject to a performance period running until 31 December 2028 and, for certain executives, an additional two-year holding requirement.

The plan also entitles recipients to receive dividend equivalents in shares on any future dividends declared before the awards are released, reinforcing the link between management rewards and shareholder returns. The grants underscore Energean’s continued use of equity-based compensation to incentivise long-term value creation and retain key leadership across its core business units.

data.title: American Pacific Closes Tuscarora Sale to ICG as Nevada Assets Spin Out
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from American Pacific Mining ( (TSE:USGD) ) is now available.

American Pacific Mining and ICG Silver & Gold have closed a plan of arrangement under which American Pacific sold 100% of its Tuscarora and Danny Boy silver-gold projects in Nevada to ICG. The transaction is structured through the sale of two American Pacific subsidiaries in exchange for 11.5 million ICG shares, a contingent US$5 million production payment, and a pro-rata distribution of 7.5 million ICG shares to American Pacific shareholders.

ICG has secured conditional Canadian Securities Exchange approval, with its shares, including those distributed to American Pacific investors, expected to begin trading on March 31 under the ticker ICG. The deal allows ICG to advance the Tuscarora District with fresh capital from a $2.8 million financing while American Pacific retains equity exposure to the asset and refocuses on its Madison Copper-Gold Project in Montana, potentially sharpening its strategic positioning in the North American metals sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:USGD) stock is a Hold with a C$0.22 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on American Pacific Mining stock, see the TSE:USGD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on USGD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, USGD is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing cash burn, and poor earnings quality despite recent positive net income). Technicals provide some support with price above key moving averages and positive MACD, but valuation remains a headwind due to a high P/E and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on USGD stock, click here.

More about American Pacific Mining

American Pacific Mining Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on precious and base metals, with key assets in North American mining jurisdictions. Its portfolio includes the flagship Madison Copper-Gold Project in Montana, while it has also advanced district-scale silver and gold projects in Nevada through exploration and strategic transactions.

Average Trading Volume: 1,105,193

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$31.77M

data.title: Maven Income and Growth VCT 4 Cuts Share Count in Latest Buy-Back
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Maven Income and Growth VCT 4 ( (GB:MAV4) ) has shared an announcement.

Maven Income and Growth VCT 4 PLC has executed a share buy-back, repurchasing 1,981,251 of its own ordinary shares at 51.5p per share for cancellation as part of its ongoing capital management strategy. The transaction reduces the company’s issued share capital to 163,306,920 ordinary shares, and the updated voting share figure will serve as the new reference point for shareholders assessing disclosure obligations under FCA transparency rules.

The reduction in the number of shares in issue may enhance net asset value per share over time and signals continued use of buy-backs to provide liquidity and support the secondary market in the VCT’s shares. Shareholders and potential investors now have a clarified denominator for calculating voting rights and determining whether they must notify holdings or changes in holdings to the market under regulatory requirements.

More about Maven Income and Growth VCT 4

Maven Income and Growth VCT 4 PLC is a UK-listed venture capital trust that provides investors with exposure to a diversified portfolio of smaller, growth-oriented private and AIM-quoted companies. It is managed by Maven Capital Partners UK LLP and focuses on delivering income and capital returns under the UK VCT regime.

Average Trading Volume: 9,722

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Learn more about MAV4 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
